title: infuse-RP
description: The Resource Pack for the Infuse SMP plugin
body:
Infuse SMP Official Resource Pack

**This pack is required for the full Infuse SMP experience and is intended to be used alongside the Infuse SMP plugin on supported servers.**

This resource pack is designed specifically for the Infuse SMP plugin. It has been updated to work seamlessly across Minecraft 1.21 through 1.21.11, including compatibility with the newer item model and tint systems introduced in recent versions.

**My Infuse Plugin is found here:**
